method: deep multi-factor research — momentum/quality/growth/catalyst sleeves + valuation → adversarial verify → synthesis (see producer/AGENTIC.md). Refreshed weekly; this is the canonical target the Agentic Portfolio card + rebalance planner read.

names.thesis: Broad-market ballast — diffuses single-name catalyst risk; core hold.
Broadest multi-sleeve leader (momentum 9 / quality 8.5 / growth 9); capped — parabolic entry.
Elite quality 9.5 / growth 8.5 with valuation cushion; knife-catch into Aug catalyst, tight stop.
Quality 9.5 + growth 8; the cleanest adversarial 'buy'; interchange/antitrust is the watch-item.
Quality 9 + deep valuation; 'buy' verdict; momentum into a pullback ahead of 7/22 earnings.
Balanced quality/growth (7.5/7.5) for sector breadth; 'hold' on the 200-DMA into 7/30 — smaller satellite.
Best valuation 7.5 + quality 9; soft momentum (prints get sold) → second Tech-Svcs slot, defensive weight.
Quality 7.5 but 'hold' at full valuation near ATHs into 7/14 — smallest financial slot for balance.
